visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visas issued on the ground of study in Ukraine.
Kindly note that there is no appointment system to submit your visa application to Ukraine. VFS will accept applications based on first-come-first-serve basis.  Taking into account
                                                                        that there is a maximum capacity of visa applications that can be accepted per day – which is set by the Consulate General of Ukraine in Dubai.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview Visas issued on the ground of study in Ukraine. Kindly note that there is no appointment system to submit your visa application to Ukraine. VFS will accept applications based on first-come-first-serve basis.  Taking into account that there is a maximum capacity of visa applications that can be accepted per day – which is set by the Consulate General of Ukraine in Dubai. ## Visa Fees [Table:   Study – D-13] [Table:   Study – D-13] Please be informed that the fees charged by the Embassy or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification. All Fees are Non-Refundable. Applicants are requested to check applicable visa fee; Nationality and Category Wise - Ukraine Visa Fee List (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/14wugBBIGi3DWflTR2jN50/269c4f2a9d94a359e969324603d267e3/Ukraine-Visa-fee-List-17.08.2022.pdf) Urgent Processing is available to certain Nationalities only. The Visa Fee for Urgent Processing is double of that mentioned above and in the Visa Fee List. Urgent Processing is not available for following Nationalities. Click Here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/23TCjUfF5jIzHbMCqxKRCy/c7b462f3e6d210cd66ff53152e73b2b3/nationalities-not-eligible-for-urgent-processing.pdf). Ukraine Visa Fee Exemption (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4btJDTydHi3gft2veMxIsz/49d905ad84e7cb385e8559a0eeb70b41/ukraine-visa-fee-exemption-dec-2021.pdf) Entry regime to Ukraine for foreign citizens (https://mfa.gov.ua/en/consular-affairs/entry-and-stay-foreigners-ukraine/entry-regime-ukraine-foreign-citizens) ## Documents Required Travel insurance is mandatory for Ukraine. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/ukr/travel-insurance-non-schengen) for Travel Medical Insurance. Ukrainian COVID-19 Insurance is mandatory for Ukraine. Please read Ukrainian Insurance Requirement (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/ukr/news/ukrainian-insurance-requirement) Customers can purchase the Ukrainian COVID-19 Cover from www.visitukraine.today (https://visitukraine.today/). The above link is a suggestion; Customers can provide Ukrainian COVID-19 Cover from any Ukrainian Insurance Provider. Download (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/NFFPkUby0J0ORdE9hTVE6/6722d3b4345ca9f627188a1f924d6ba9/ukraine-checklist-study-d13-updated.pdf) Checklist for Ukraine Study Visa Note: All Applicants of the age 12 and above must visit the VAC for Visa Application Submission and Biometric Collection. ## Photo Specifications A Photograph submitted with the application form should comply with the following specifications:

- Must be an up to date photograph (not more than 6 months old) - Must be a colour photograph printed on normal photographic paper - Should be passport sized 3,5 х 4,5 сm - Face should take 70-80% of the photograph - The size of the face from the bottom of your chin to the hairline must be between 31mm and 36mm - The background shall be plain and light coloured - Without sunglasses - Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons - Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses - The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes - The mouth must be closed Please note that photos that do not comply with these standards are not accepted. ## Processing Time The processing time for the application is approximately 10 - 15 working days, unless otherwise stipulated by the Ukraine Consulate depending on the supporting documents submitted; this period may be extended up to 30 working days if additional checks are necessary. Please note that your passport will be kept during the visa application process. Please be advised that due to the above mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel. Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences. ## Download Forms Please note that one can use the Form Filling service for the convenience of the customers at the centre. Feel free to contact the VAC staff to know more about the Form Filling service. The Visa Application Form must be filled completely and must be signed by the customer himself/herself. Visa Application Form (https://visa.mfa.gov.ua/system/index) Please Note the following while filling the Visa Application Form; Customers submitting in UAE must select ‘United Arab Emirates’ as response to “Submit documents in the following country” As response for “Submit documents in the following place”; Customers applying in Abu Dhabi must select ‘Visa Application Centre of Ukraine in Abu Dhabi’ Customers applying in Dubai must select ‘Visa Application Centre of Ukraine in Dubai’ Forms listed below must be filled in completely and must be signed by the applicant himself/herself. Visa application form can be filled in online and then printed out. (http://visa.mfa.gov.ua/)

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview Visa for Travelers with purpose of performing Cultural, Scientific, Educational and Sport Activities in Ukraine at the Invitation of recognized Ukrainian institution. Kindly note that there is no appointment system to submit your visa application to Ukraine. VFS will accept applications based on first-come-first-serve basis. Taking into account that there is a maximum capacity of visa applications that can be accepted per day – which is set by the Consulate General of Ukraine in Dubai. ## Visa Fees [Table:   Cultural, Scientific, Educational, Sport Activities Visit – C-09] [Table:   Cultural, Scientific, Educational, Sport Activities Visit – C-09] Please be informed that the fees charged by the Embassy or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification. All Fees are Non-Refundable. Applicants are requested to check applicable visa fee; Nationality and Category Wise - Ukraine Visa Fee List (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/14wugBBIGi3DWflTR2jN50/269c4f2a9d94a359e969324603d267e3/Ukraine-Visa-fee-List-17.08.2022.pdf) Urgent Processing is available to certain Nationalities only. The Visa Fee for Urgent Processing is double of that mentioned above and in the Visa Fee List. Urgent Processing is not available for following Nationalities. Click Here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/23TCjUfF5jIzHbMCqxKRCy/c7b462f3e6d210cd66ff53152e73b2b3/nationalities-not-eligible-for-urgent-processing.pdf). Ukraine Visa Fee Exemption (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4btJDTydHi3gft2veMxIsz/49d905ad84e7cb385e8559a0eeb70b41/ukraine-visa-fee-exemption-dec-2021.pdf) Entry regime to Ukraine for foreign citizens (https://mfa.gov.ua/en/consular-affairs/entry-and-stay-foreigners-ukraine/entry-regime-ukraine-foreign-citizens) ## Documents Required Travel insurance is mandatory for Ukraine. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/ukr/travel-insurance-non-schengen) for Travel Medical Insurance. Ukrainian COVID-19 Insurance is mandatory for Ukraine. Please read Ukrainian Insurance Requirement (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/ukr/news/ukrainian-insurance-requirement) Customers can purchase the Ukrainian COVID-19 Cover from www.visitukraine.today (https://visitukraine.today/). The above link is a suggestion; Customers can provide Ukrainian COVID-19 Cover from any Ukrainian Insurance Provider. Download (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1uDrpXumaGi61hvUGSMIav/c00b76b3ee71fe49b4967c2c071b3468/ukraine-checklist-cultural-educational-scientific-sport-volunteer-c09.pdf) Checklist for Ukraine Cultural, Scientific, Educational, Sport Activities Visit Visa Note: All Applicants of the age 12 and above must visit the VAC for Visa Application Submission and Biometric Collection. ## Photo Specifications A Photograph submitted with the application form should comply with the following specifications:

- Must be an up to date photograph (not more than 6 months old) - Must be a colour photograph printed on normal photographic paper - Should be passport sized 3,5 х 4,5 сm - Face should take 70-80% of the photograph - The size of the face from the bottom of your chin to the hairline must be between 31mm and 36mm - The background shall be plain and light coloured - Without sunglasses - Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons - Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses - The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes - The mouth must be closed Please note that photos that do not comply with these standards are not accepted. ## Processing Time The processing time for the application is approximately 10 - 15 working days, unless otherwise stipulated by the Ukraine Consulate depending on the supporting documents submitted; this period may be extended up to 30 working days if additional checks are necessary. Please note that your passport will be kept during the visa application process. Please be advised that due to the above mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel. Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences. ## Download Forms Please note that one can use the Form Filling service for the convenience of the customers at the centre. Feel free to contact the VAC staff to know more about the Form Filling service. The Visa Application Form must be filled completely and must be signed by the customer himself/herself. visa_types.name: Short Term – C- Type Visa
visa_types.overview:
C type (short term) visas are issued in cases where a foreigner/stateless person intends to stay in Ukraine for up to 90 days (within every 180 days).
C type visas are issued as single / double / multiple entry visas valid for 6 months or another period depending on supporting documents but cannot be issued for more than a 5 year-term.
E-Visa to Ukraine for C-Type Visas.
Certain Nationalities are eligible to apply and obtain E-Visa for Ukraine. Please check eligibility here (https://mfa.gov.ua/en/consular-affairs/entry-and-stay-foreigners-ukraine/e-visa)
Processing Time for E-Visas is about 9 Working days. Please check processing times here
Please Note: E-Visas are processed and issued by Ukrainian Immigration Authorities only. 
Local Consulate/ Embassy of Ukraine nor Visa Application Centres decide or can provide update regarding E-Visas.
Please visit 
Entry regime to Ukraine for Foreign Citizens (https://mfa.gov.ua/en/consular-affairs/entry-and-stay-foreigners-ukraine/entry-regime-ukraine-foreign-citizens)
Visa information for Processing Times (https://mfa.gov.ua/en/consular-affairs/entry-and-stay-foreigners-ukraine/visa-information)
E-Visa Portal (https://evisa.mfa.gov.ua/)

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview Transit visas are issued in cases where a foreigner/stateless person intends to transit through Ukraine and each transit period does not exceed 5 days. Kindly note that there is no appointment system to submit your visa application to Ukraine. VFS will accept applications based on first-come-first-serve basis. Taking into account that there is a maximum capacity of visa applications that can be accepted per day – which is set by the Consulate General of Ukraine in Dubai. ## Visa Fees [Table:   Transit – B-01] [Table:   Transit – B-01] Please be informed that the fees charged by the Embassy or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification. All Fees are Non-Refundable. Applicants are requested to check applicable visa fee; Nationality and Category Wise - Ukraine Visa Fee List (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/14wugBBIGi3DWflTR2jN50/269c4f2a9d94a359e969324603d267e3/Ukraine-Visa-fee-List-17.08.2022.pdf) Urgent Processing is available to certain Nationalities only. The Visa Fee for Urgent Processing is double of that mentioned above and in the Visa Fee List. Urgent Processing is not available for following Nationalities. Click Here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/23TCjUfF5jIzHbMCqxKRCy/c7b462f3e6d210cd66ff53152e73b2b3/nationalities-not-eligible-for-urgent-processing.pdf). Ukraine Visa Fee Exemption (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4btJDTydHi3gft2veMxIsz/49d905ad84e7cb385e8559a0eeb70b41/ukraine-visa-fee-exemption-dec-2021.pdf) Entry regime to Ukraine for foreign citizens (https://mfa.gov.ua/en/consular-affairs/entry-and-stay-foreigners-ukraine/entry-regime-ukraine-foreign-citizens) ## Documents Required Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/ukr/travel-insurance-non-schengen) Ukrainian COVID-19 Insurance is mandatory for Ukraine. Please read Ukrainian Insurance Requirement (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/ukr/news/ukrainian-insurance-requirement) Customers can purchase the COVID-19 cover from VisitUkraine.Today (https://www.visitukraine.today/) The above link is a suggestion; Customers can provide Ukrainian COVID-19 Cover from any Ukrainian Insurance Provider. Download (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/868M6ZWUf9gHg5caN5tj9/375a25ea18f0063ad615cd3bbdbf4c01/ukraine-checklist-transit-b01-updated.pdf) Checklist for Ukraine Transit Visa Note: All Applicants of the age 12 and above must visit the VAC for Visa Application Submission and Biometric Collection. ## Photo Specifications A Photograph submitted with the application form should comply with the following specifications:

- Must be an up to date photograph (not more than 6 months old) - Must be a colour photograph printed on normal photographic paper - Should be passport sized 3,5 х 4,5 сm - Face should take 70-80% of the photograph - The size of the face from the bottom of your chin to the hairline must be between 31mm and 36mm - The background shall be plain and light coloured - Without sunglasses - Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons - Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses - The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes - The mouth must be closed Please note that photos that do not comply with these standards are not accepted. ## Processing Time The processing time for the application is approximately 10 - 15 working days, unless otherwise stipulated by the Ukraine Consulate depending on the supporting documents submitted; this period may be extended up to 30 working days if additional checks are necessary. Please note that your passport will be kept during the visa application process. Please be advised that due to the above mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel. Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences. ## Download Forms Please note that one can use the Form Filling service for the convenience of the customers at the centre. Feel free to contact the VAC staff to know more about the Form Filling service. The Visa Application Form must be filled completely and must be signed by the customer himself/herself. Visa Application Form (https://visa.mfa.gov.ua/system/index) Please Note the following while filling the Visa Application Form; Customers submitting in UAE must select ‘United Arab Emirates’ as response to “Submit documents in the following country” As response for “Submit documents in the following place”; Customers applying in Abu Dhabi must select ‘Visa Application Centre of Ukraine in Abu Dhabi’ Customers applying in Dubai must select ‘Visa Application Centre of Ukraine in Dubai’

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview Family reunification with foreigner or stateless person legally residing in Ukraine. Kindly note that there is no appointment system to submit your visa application to Ukraine. VFS will accept applications based on first-come-first-serve basis.  Taking into account that there is a maximum capacity of visa applications that can be accepted per day – which is set by the Consulate General of Ukraine in Dubai. ## Visa Fees [Table:   Family Reunion with foreigner residing in Ukraine upon temporary residence permit – D-15] [Table:   Family Reunion with foreigner residing in Ukraine upon temporary residence permit – D-15] Please be informed that the fees charged by the Embassy or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification. All Fees are Non-Refundable. Applicants are requested to check applicable visa fee; Nationality and Category Wise - Ukraine Visa Fee List (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/14wugBBIGi3DWflTR2jN50/269c4f2a9d94a359e969324603d267e3/Ukraine-Visa-fee-List-17.08.2022.pdf) Urgent Processing is available to certain Nationalities only. The Visa Fee for Urgent Processing is double of that mentioned above and in the Visa Fee List. Urgent Processing is not available for following Nationalities. Click Here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/23TCjUfF5jIzHbMCqxKRCy/c7b462f3e6d210cd66ff53152e73b2b3/nationalities-not-eligible-for-urgent-processing.pdf). Ukraine Visa Fee Exemption (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4btJDTydHi3gft2veMxIsz/49d905ad84e7cb385e8559a0eeb70b41/ukraine-visa-fee-exemption-dec-2021.pdf) Entry regime to Ukraine for foreign citizens (https://mfa.gov.ua/en/consular-affairs/entry-and-stay-foreigners-ukraine/entry-regime-ukraine-foreign-citizens) ## Documents Required Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/ukr/travel-insurance-non-schengen) Ukrainian COVID-19 Insurance is mandatory for Ukraine. Please read Ukrainian Insurance Requirement (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/ukr/news/ukrainian-insurance-requirement). Customers can purchase the COVID-19 cover from VisitUkraine.Today (https://www.visitukraine.today/) The above link is a suggestion; Customers can provide Ukrainian COVID-19 Cover from any Ukrainian Insurance Provider. Download (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/ANIgaRtpiNhI85rjByheE/f42c74ecf6eb7c39e74957f2baabab30/ukraine-checklist-family-reunion-foreigner-d15-updated.pdf) Checklist for Ukraine Family Reunion with Foreigner residing in Ukraine upon temporary residence permit Visa Note: All Applicants of the age 12 and above must visit the VAC for Visa Application Submission and Biometric Collection. ## Photo Specifications A Photograph submitted with the application form should comply with the following specifications:

- Must be an up to date photograph (not more than 6 months old) - Must be a colour photograph printed on normal photographic paper - Should be passport sized 3,5 х 4,5 сm - Face should take 70-80% of the photograph - The size of the face from the bottom of your chin to the hairline must be between 31mm and 36mm - The background shall be plain and light coloured - Without sunglasses - Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons - Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses - The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes - The mouth must be closed Please note that photos that do not comply with these standards are not accepted. ## Processing Time The processing time for the application is approximately 10 - 15 working days, unless otherwise stipulated by the Ukraine Consulate depending on the supporting documents submitted; this period may be extended up to 30 working days if additional checks are necessary. Please note that your passport will be kept during the visa application process. Please be advised that due to the above mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel. Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences. ## Download Forms Please note that one can use the Form Filling service for the convenience of the customers at the centre. Feel free to contact the VAC staff to know more about the Form Filling service. The Visa Application Form must be filled completely and must be signed by the customer himself/herself. Visa Application Form (https://visa.mfa.gov.ua/system/index) Please Note the following while filling the Visa Application Form; Customers submitting in UAE must select ‘United Arab Emirates’ as response to “Submit documents in the following country” As response for “Submit documents in the following place”; Customers applying in Abu Dhabi must select ‘Visa Application Centre of Ukraine in Abu Dhabi’ Customers applying in Dubai must select ‘Visa Application Centre of Ukraine in Dubai’

The Visa Fee for Urgent Processing is double of that mentioned above and in the Visa Fee List. Urgent Processing is not available for following Nationalities. Click Here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/23TCjUfF5jIzHbMCqxKRCy/c7b462f3e6d210cd66ff53152e73b2b3/nationalities-not-eligible-for-urgent-processing.pdf). Ukraine Visa Fee Exemption (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4btJDTydHi3gft2veMxIsz/49d905ad84e7cb385e8559a0eeb70b41/ukraine-visa-fee-exemption-dec-2021.pdf) Entry regime to Ukraine for foreign citizens (https://mfa.gov.ua/en/consular-affairs/entry-and-stay-foreigners-ukraine/entry-regime-ukraine-foreign-citizens) ## Documents Required Travel insurance is mandatory for Ukraine. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/ukr/travel-insurance-non-schengen) for Travel Medical Insurance. Ukrainian COVID-19 Insurance is mandatory for Ukraine. Please read Ukrainian Insurance Requirement (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/ukr/news/ukrainian-insurance-requirement) Customers can purchase the Ukrainian COVID-19 Cover from www.visitukraine.today (https://visitukraine.today/). The above link is a suggestion; Customers can provide Ukrainian COVID-19 Cover from any Ukrainian Insurance Provider. Download (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4EsviAELa3V30ntt6KSXWG/21b5612fbfb88389ec0e12a88cbd5367/ukraine-checklist-family-reunion-d14-updated.pdf) Checklist for Ukraine Family Reunion with Ukraine’s National (Spouse Visa) Visa Note: All Applicants of the age 12 and above must visit the VAC for Visa Application Submission and Biometric Collection. ## Photo Specifications A Photograph submitted with the application form should comply with the following specifications:

- Must be an up to date photograph (not more than 6 months old) - Must be a colour photograph printed on normal photographic paper - Should be passport sized 3,5 х 4,5 сm - Face should take 70-80% of the photograph - The size of the face from the bottom of your chin to the hairline must be between 31mm and 36mm - The background shall be plain and light coloured - Without sunglasses - Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons - Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses - The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes - The mouth must be closed Please note that photos that do not comply with these standards are not accepted. ## Processing Time The processing time for the application is approximately 10 - 15 working days, unless otherwise stipulated by the Ukraine Consulate depending on the supporting documents submitted; this period may be extended up to 30 working days if additional checks are necessary. Please note that your passport will be kept during the visa application process. Please be advised that due to the above mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel. Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences. ## Download Forms Please note that one can use the Form Filling service for the convenience of the customers at the centre. Feel free to contact the VAC staff to know more about the Form Filling service. The Visa Application Form must be filled completely and must be signed by the customer himself/herself. Visa Application Form (https://visa.mfa.gov.ua/system/index) Please Note the following while filling the Visa Application Form; Customers submitting in UAE must select ‘United Arab Emirates’ as response to “Submit documents in the following country” As response for “Submit documents in the following place”; Customers applying in Abu Dhabi must select ‘Visa Application Centre of Ukraine in Abu Dhabi’ Customers applying in Dubai must select ‘Visa Application Centre of Ukraine in Dubai’

visa_types.name: Long Term – D-Type Visa
visa_types.overview:
Long-term (type D) Ukrainian visas are issued as a multiple entry visas for 90 days(unless otherwise stipulated by legislation or international treaties of Ukraine) within which applicants are to
                                                            enter Ukraine and apply to local offices of the State Migration Service of Ukraine for a temporary residence permit.
Detailed information on how to apply for temporary residence permits can be found at the State Migration Service of Ukraine website (https://dmsu.gov.ua/en-home.html)                                                            (in Ukrainian only).
